title: Refactor timing debug printing
body:
Refactors debug printing in `verilated_timing.*`.

* Puts suspended coroutine source location in a separate struct,
* `dump()` always prints, calls wrapped in `VL_DEBUG_IF`.

Pre-PR to https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/3599 and https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/3653.

Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Bieganski <kbieganski@antmicro.com>
